**Commands**

- `/help` ‚Äî show available commands
- `/clear` ‚Äî clear the current transcript
- `/plan` ‚Äî summarize the current tracked plan
- `/invariants` ‚Äî summarize the tracked invariant checklist
- `/runtime` ‚Äî show the effective runtime profile
- `/verify` ‚Äî show the latest verification summary
- `/compact` ‚Äî compress conversation context
- `/cost` ‚Äî show session cost breakdown
- `/resume` ‚Äî restore the last saved session
- `/model [name]` ‚Äî show or switch the active model
- `/diff` ‚Äî show git diff of uncommitted changes
- `/undo [path]` ‚Äî revert one unstaged git-tracked file change
- `/doctor` ‚Äî diagnose setup issues
- `/config` ‚Äî show effective configuration
- `/skills` ‚Äî list detected skills
- `/skill <name>` ‚Äî toggle a skill on or off
- `/quit` or `/exit` ‚Äî quit the app

**Keys**

- `Enter` ‚Äî send
- `Shift+Enter` ‚Äî insert newline
- `Esc` ‚Äî cancel the active run
- `‚Üë/‚Üì` ‚Äî recall input history
- `PgUp/PgDn` ‚Äî scroll the transcript
